claim_scope: finite exact balanced-precision paths in the displayed schedule, headroom, and cycle box; exact hits are finite EC17 links only
theorem_interface: At balanced precision, D(q)<3^Q(q) and the target has ell(q) free high bits, so |C_q|<3^Q(q). Therefore the full composite predecessor congruence is equivalent to C_q=0 and to one exact three-step link between the two canonical representatives. Only an all-future exact-hit tail would construct an infinite ray.
